name: Potato Topped Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef, veal, pork and cornflakes.
2. Beat the eggs, then add them to the meat mixture along with salt, sage and milk.
3. Place the mixture in a greased loaf pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
5. Unmold the meatloaf.
6. Frost the top of the meatloaf with the hot mashed potatoes.
7. Bake at 350°F until the potatoes are browned.
